title: Screen
drDigitalIntro: Let's meet the parts of your laptop, one at a time. First up is the part you're looking at right now — your screen! It's made up of millions of tiny colored lights called pixels, and together they paint everything you see: words, pictures, videos, all of it.
drDigitalSuccess: That's your screen! Every single thing on your laptop shows up there. Let's look at the next part.
drDigitalHint: No rush — just take a look at your own screen, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
